ads.author: Melissa Foster
ads.title: Gridiron Football Pinball Machine
ads.description: GOTTLIEB GRIDIRON Gridiron is a pinball machine from December 1977, manufactured by D. Gottlieb &amp; Co. It is a football themed game with a unique dual scoring system. It keeps standard pinball scores as well as football scores from various targets on the playfield. Machine lights turn on and will function, but needs work. Cosmetic repairs needed.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Police Trainer, Upright Arcade, P&P Marketing 1996
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Police Trainer (P&P Marketing, 1996) Not the original dedicated cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet needs some love due to age. - Monitor powers on, image is good, but likely needs new caps - Lights and sound both work. - Controls function, but the guns need recalibration. - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988 (Project Cab)
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) This is a Capcom Bowling upright arcade cabinet in a Centipede Cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Monitor does not currently power on — likely needs new caps. - Nothing comes on at the moment; best to start troubleshooting with the power supply and work your way from there. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. - Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $200, or best offer - Serious buyers only. Price Breakdown: Capcom Bowling PCS ($40) Control Panel and Trackball ($60) Cabinet ($100) CRT (dunno if its dead so $0?) Wiring, coin door, misc ($40)

ads.description: Title Fight Arcade Cabinet Project Piece. Receives power and intermittent signal to monitors but game does not start and have too many other projects to work on to tackle this one. Has two 26" Mitsubishi Monitors, all of the wiring is in tact, handles need repair/replacement, missing start button toppers. Good for a project or to part out - I just don't have time for either of those at this point. Looking for cash or trade for working arcade cabinets (coin operated, no Arcade 1Ups). Pickup in Jacksonville Florida. Item is heavy (and top heavy), lift gate recommended or three person load.

ads.description: Local pickup only. Vintage pinball machines. $850 each. Each one needs minor repairs, we just don’t have time to keep up with them as these are located in a business. Royal Flush(sold) King Pin (sold) 2001 (sold) Beat Time needs a new power cord. (We think). Otherwise working good before it stopped powering on. Seriously inquiries only. Thank you.

ads.author: David Bolton
ads.title: Pinball machine Hokus Pokus 1975 owned since 1979
ads.description: Edit March 20 We moved into new place and something happened along the way where it is no longer resetting. When you hit the reset button it makes a noise like it's going from one to two player but nothing resets. I know it's something minor. I have lowered the price considerably. Had every switch , blade and contact filed and cleaned and machine shopped out in 2021 by Terri Irwin , a long time respected pinball mechanic in Ocala. Has a few lights out. Only issue is sometimes the sco re reel does not completely set over and you have to hit the button again to restart it. One of those Ghost in the machine kind of things that she just couldn't figure out . I have owned this game since 1979 when I received it as a kid. You might have seen this up for sale in the past and then the listing disappeared. This was a period of time when I needed money for something so I put it up for sale but then something else came through and I took it down because I didn't really want to sell it. At this point in life it is mostly just nostalgia. I just don't play it anymore. It is very fun game I am just bored with it after 45 years and want something different. Very open to trades for a newer pinball machine plus cash on my end. Thanks for looking! Nine zero four four four four one four three nine.. Dave

ads.author: Byron Gaddis
ads.title: California Speed Video Driving Arcade Game
ads.description: Up for your consideration is a California Speed Arcade driving game. It plays as is but would definitely benefit from a LCD monitor. I’ve had this machine for about 8 years and it has just started buzzing when you turn it on. I don’t know anything about these but I did talk to an arcade dealer and he said that it’s likely inference or the sound board. This machine does have the ability to be paired with another machine. Will consider trading up or down for a slot machine, pinball machine, vintage gas pump, man cave stuff.
